mapper.select: /* StandardDisplayCategoryConnectQueryRepository.selectConnectList */ SELECT PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO, PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO, PDCBM.DISP_CTG_NM, PSCDI.REP_CTG_YN, PSCDI.SITE_NO, CSB.SITE_NM, PSCDI.DPML_NO, PDB.DPML_NM, PSCDI.USE_YN, PSCDI.DEL_YN, PSCDI.SYS_REG_ID, PSCDI.SYS_REG_DTM, PSCDI.SYS_MOD_ID, PSCDI.SYS_MOD_DTM FROM PR_STD_CTG_DISP_INFO PSCDI INNER JOIN PR_DISP_CTG_BASE_ML PDCBM ON PSCDI.DISP_CTG_NO = PDCBM.DISP_CTG_NO AND PDCBM.LANG_CD = 'ko' INNER JOIN CC_SITE_BASE CSB ON PSCDI.SITE_NO = CSB.SITE_NO INNER JOIN PR_DPML_BASE PDB ON PSCDI.DPML_NO = PDB.DPML_NO WHERE PSCDI.STD_CTG_NO = #{stdCtgNo} AND PSCDI.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY PSCDI.REP_CTG_YN DESC, PSCDI.SYS_MOD_DTM DESC
